GenAiFunction.description:
Load user context (identity, timezone, org URL, current date/time) AND the user's stored custom instructions from previous conversations. MUST be called as the FIRST action of every new conversation, before any other action.
Use when: - A conversation begins — call this before doing anything else (including before any topic-specific work). - At the start of every headless PlanForLater / RunMyOrgButler execution — step 1 of the numbered plan.
Returns: - User: Id, name, email, language, timezone — needed for "my accounts", "last week", user-filtered queries. - Org: Id, base URL — needed for building record links. - Current date/time in the user's timezone — needed for relative dates and cron schedules. - Custom instructions (preferences, corrections, tool-use rules) the user has asked to remember.
CRITICAL: the returned custom instructions are binding for the rest of the conversation. Apply them to every subsequent response and action.
NOT for: - Storing a new preference — use StoreCustomInstruction. - Reading arbitrary records — use QueryRecordsWithSoql.
